report.summary: Community growth cycle v24: Chain Abstraction + Prediction Markets double-guide launch (build-v9, zero prior social coverage); ecosystem pages amplification (Aave/Lido/Uniswap from publish-v5); 2 new social cards created; posting schedule extended Sun Mar 23 + Mon Mar 24; newsletter amendments for Thu Mar 19.

sections.title: Social Content Drafted
items: Twitter thread (Sun Mar 23 AM, 5 posts): Chain Abstraction — 'The multi-chain future has a UX problem'; 4 approaches (Particle 110K accounts, NEAR Chain Signatures, Socket 300+ chains, Keystore Rollups); honest risks; Messari quote; CTA to /learn/chain-abstraction-guide-2026
Tweet (Sun Mar 23 AM): Chain Abstraction punchy single — stat-led format with all 4 approaches and key numbers
Tweet (Sun Mar 23 AM): Prediction Markets educational single — $5B/week volume hook; Kalshi 66% share, Polymarket $33.8B, AI agents 376% returns; CTA to /learn/crypto-prediction-markets-guide-2026
Discord/Telegram (Sun Mar 23 AM): Double guide drop — Chain Abstraction + Prediction Markets with interactive calculator callout and key features
Tweet (Mon Mar 24): DeFi Big Three ecosystem pages — Aave $20B+ TVL, Lido 29% staked ETH, Uniswap $2T+ volume; links to /ecosystem/aave, /ecosystem/lido, /ecosystem/uniswap

Newsletter amendments (Thu Mar 19): Chain Abstraction + Prediction Markets + Ecosystem Pages added to NEW ON DEGEN0X section; Degen Corner updated with prediction markets thesis (73% accuracy, AI agents, regulatory arbitrage window narrowing)

sections.title: Visual Assets Created
items: social-chain-abstraction-guide.svg — 1200x630 social card: cyan-to-purple gradient theme; 'One Account. Every Chain.' title; 3 stat chips (110K Universal Accounts, +557% QoQ, 300+ Chains); 4 numbered approach cards (Universal Accounts/Chain Signatures/Intent-Based/Orchestration); right panel flow diagram (User → Abstraction Layer → ETH/BTC/SOL/ATOM/+15); Messari quote; degen0x brand bar. Saved to /public/social-chain-abstraction-guide.svg

social-prediction-markets-guide.svg — 1200x630 social card: green-to-cyan theme; $5B/week hero stat; 73%/84% accuracy badges; Kalshi + Polymarket detailed cards + 4 mini platform cards; right panel with binary outcome visualization (YES/NO bar), AI agents section (+376%), 4 market category chips, regulatory warning, interactive calculator callout; degen0x brand bar. Saved to /public/social-prediction-markets-guide.svg

sections.title: Analytics Context
items: Chain Abstraction: Messari 2026 Theses named it 'the key to victory' — Particle Network 110K accounts + 557% QoQ and NEAR Chain Signatures mainnet launch signal breakout search intent. Zero social coverage on degen0x until now.

Prediction Markets: $5B/week combined volume is a massive hook. Polymarket ICE investment ($2B at $8-9B valuation) was headline crypto deal of early 2026. Interactive PredictionMarketCalculator differentiates from competitor content.

Ecosystem pages (Aave/Lido/Uniswap): published silently in publish-v5 — social amplification converts indexed-only pages to traffic-driving pages. Aave V4 social thread already queued from v17, ecosystem page adds depth.

Calendar now covers 12+ days: v17 (Mon-Fri Mar 16-20 core), v18 (Sat-Mon Mar 21-23 Aztec), v19 (FOMC urgency + restaking Mar 24-27), v22-23 (DA Layer/Options/HIP-3), v24 (Chain Abstraction + Prediction Markets Sun-Mon Mar 23-24). No posting conflicts detected.

Cross-content: Chain abstraction thread references /learn/cross-chain-bridges-guide and /learn/account-abstraction-explained. Prediction markets links to /learn/crypto-derivatives and /tools/options-calculator.
